findings.description: dladdr call detected (validates caller address or detects function hooking)

evidence.detects: Function hooks, injected code, unexpected callers

findings.impact: Can detect if functions have been hooked by checking if return addresses are in expected libraries
findings.recommendation: Hook dladdr to return expected Dl_info values

findings.description: dlsym call detected (dynamic symbol resolution, may resolve anti-debug APIs at runtime)

evidence.note: May resolve ptrace, sysctl, or other anti-debug functions to evade static analysis

findings.impact: Can dynamically resolve security-sensitive functions to bypass static analysis detection
findings.recommendation: Hook ptrace in '_disable_gdb' and return 0 to prevent debugger denial; alternatively NOP the call instruction

findings.description: dlsym call detected (dynamic symbol resolution, may resolve anti-debug APIs at runtime)

evidence.note: May resolve ptrace, sysctl, or other anti-debug functions to evade static analysis

findings.impact: Can dynamically resolve security-sensitive functions to bypass static analysis detection
findings.recommendation: Hook dlsym to monitor which symbols are being resolved

findings.description: _dyld_get_image_name call detected (enumerates loaded library paths)
findings.impact: Can detect injected libraries by checking image paths for known hooking frameworks
findings.recommendation: Hook _dyld_image_count/_dyld_get_image_name to hide injected libraries, or hook '_detect_injected_dylds' to return false/0

findings.description: _dyld_image_count call detected (counts loaded images)

evidence.note: Typically used with _dyld_get_image_name to enumerate libraries

findings.impact: Can detect unexpected libraries by monitoring loaded image count
findings.recommendation: Hook _dyld_image_count/_dyld_get_image_name to hide injected libraries, or hook '_detect_injected_dylds' to return false/0

findings.description: sysctl call detected checking P_TRACED flag
findings.impact: Can detect if process is being traced by a debugger
findings.recommendation: Hook sysctl to clear P_TRACED flag (0x800) in response

findings.description: sysctl call detected checking P_TRACED flag
findings.impact: Can detect if process is being traced by a debugger
findings.recommendation: Hook sysctl to clear P_TRACED flag (0x800) in response

findings.description: sysctl call detected checking P_TRACED flag
findings.impact: Can detect if process is being traced by a debugger
findings.recommendation: Hook '_isDebugged' to always return false/0 to bypass debugger detection; or hook sysctl to return benign values

findings.description: exit call detected (possible defensive termination after tampering detection)
findings.impact: May terminate the process when debugging or tampering is detected
findings.recommendation: Hook exit to prevent termination; investigate caller for detection logic

findings.description: task_get_exception_ports call detected (debugger handler check)
findings.impact: Debuggers register exception handlers - checking ports reveals them
findings.recommendation: Hook to return empty exception port list

findings.description: task_info call detected (may enumerate loaded libraries via TASK_DYLD_INFO)
findings.impact: TASK_DYLD_INFO can enumerate all loaded libraries to detect injection
findings.recommendation: Hook task_info to filter injected libraries from results

findings.description: task_info call detected (may enumerate loaded libraries via TASK_DYLD_INFO)
findings.impact: TASK_DYLD_INFO can enumerate all loaded libraries to detect injection
findings.recommendation: Hook task_info to filter injected libraries from results
